video.title: Giro d'Italia 2020 - Stage 20 Highlights | Cycling | Eurosport

transcript.clean_text: the final mountain stage the final road stage of this 2020 cheetah italia will take the riders up to sestria it wouldn't be the original planned route that would have taken the riders into france instead as no passage of the race had been allowed across the border there'd be no angelo and no israel but a couple of laps around cestra itself three ascents twice from the shorter but difficult side and 190 kilometers after departure from alba 21 riders would get up the road including a handful of sprinters but coming to the final laps that group would start to disintegrate first time over cestria with 51 kilometers to go and david ballerini one of three riders in the breakaway for the koenig quick step after the first ascent and looking for the second aenei rubio would go ahead colombian rider riding for movie star and behind things would be hotting up in the pink jersey group enos grenadier is going to work with row and dennis jacob fullsang dropped and then the mallards are in trouble they're still with one and a half laps to go wilco kelderman seeing his teammate go up ahead jai hindley could stay with the ineos grenadiers and it'd be down to the same three we had on the stelvio the gap opened up rather quickly and jai hindley became the virtual majors are on the road at the head of the race the kerning quick step was still working and chihuahua almeida was trying to come across from behind jai hindley would win the bonus second sprint and would extend his lead on the road to four seconds from tailgate at this point virtually in second position almost a minute back and drifting to over a minute back when chihuahua almeida tried to take time on him looking for the podium trying to take time trying to attack at the front of the race was hindley perhaps thinking that in a time trial on the final day he might not be as strong the strongest man on the day yet again was rowan dennis mvp at legitimate italia dennis the menace really making things difficult for ineos grenadier's opponents hinley would try and try again but it'd be down to a battle to the line just as it was a week previous on the slopes of pian cavallo gigan hart won then hindley responded on the stelvio but it would be gagan hart who will win the stage once more tailgate winning the stage 10 bonus seconds with hindley in second place six bonus seconds dennis in third and celebrating and both riders tied on the same time at the top of the general classification joao almeida showing that he hadn't completely cracked the pictures he had though wilco kelderman passing the pink jersey to his teammate somewhere keeping it but only by a fraction of a second tailgate winning his second stage of the italia ahead of jai hindley the two 24 year olds will fight it out in a final 15 kilometer time trial in milan for the the victory jersey for the moment stays with some web jai hindley achieving a career dream and leading the girl of italia with one stage to go but same on time level with tailgate and heart 15 kilometers to separate them with the podium difficult to be played out wilco kelderman would have to have a disaster for fail bilbao to finish in third his position in fourth not secure with almeida behind but it's all up to hinley and gegenhart to fight it out for the giro d'italia on the streets of the capital of lombardy 15 kilometers against the clock flat as a pancake minimal differences perhaps but with fractions of a second separating them at the moment it will be all down to those final 15.7 case hindley or gagan heart the closest general d'italia ever you
